title: String Reversal
text:
Given a string S (1 ≤ |S| ≤ 1000), reverse it character by character and print the result.

Input format:
A single line containing S

Output format:
The reversed string

Example:
Input:
hello

Output:
olleh
starter_code:
def solve():
    s = input().strip()
    # Reverse and print

solve()
